zh.Kenyon, Winwick, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾凱尼恩
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hesketh是Robert MASSEY和Alice Davenport的兒子，出生在英國藍卡爾盧福德。他和Valentine de Rixton至少有1個兒子。他去世於1305年之後在英國爾加福斯沃斯。

zh-hans.Kenyon, Winwick, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾凱尼恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hesketh是Robert MASSEY和Alice Davenport的儿子，出生在英国藍卡爾盧福德。他和Valentine de Rixton至少有1个儿子。他去世于1305年之后在英国爾加福斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hesketh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from Hesketh (Lancashire), Hesketh Grange in Felixkirk (North Yorkshire), or Hesket in the Forest (Cumberland). The placenames derive from Old Norse hestr ‘horse, stallion’ + skeith ‘course, track, race course’. The ancient Scandinavians were fond of horse-racing and horse-fighting, and introduced both pastimes to England.

variants.name: Heskett
meanings: English (Cumberland and Lancashire): variant of   Hesketh  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hesketh was born in Rufford, Lancashire, England as the son of Robert MASSEY and Alice Davenport. He had at least 1 son with Valentine de Rixton. He died after 1305, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hesketh est né à Rufford, Lancashire, Angleterre, fils de Robert MASSEY et Alice Davenport. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Valentine de Rixton. Il est décédé après 1305, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hesketh wurde in Rufford, Lancashire, England, als Sohn von Robert MASSEY und Alice Davenport geboren. Er hatte mit Valentine de Rixton mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 1305 in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hesketh è nato il nel Rufford, Lancashire, England come figlio di Robert MASSEY e Alice Davenport. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Valentine de Rixton. Morì dopo il 1305, nel Gawsworth, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de HeskethはイギリスランカシュアイアルフォードでRobert MASSEYとAlice Davenportの息子として生まれた。彼はValentine de Rixtonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1305年以後にイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hesketh(은)는 영국 랭카실르 루퍼드에서 Robert MASSEY(와)과 Alice Davenport의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Valentine de Rixton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1305년 이후 영국 체실르 가w스워스에서 사망했다.

mn.Kenyon, Winwick, Lancashire, England: Kenyon, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hesketh nasceu em Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra filho de Robert MASSEY e Alice Davenport. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Valentine de Rixton. Ele faleceu após 1305, em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hesketh родился в местности руффорд, ланкашир, Англия. Его родителей звали Robert MASSEY и Alice Davenport. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Valentine de Rixton. Он умер после 1305 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hesketh nació en Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hijo de Robert MASSEY y Alice Davenport. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Valentine de Rixton. Murió después de 1305, en Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
